name: Northstar Studio
summary: A premium studio website that pairs cinematic case studies with a friction-light enquiry funnel.
description: Designed to feel like a portfolio and a sales tool at once, with modular storytelling blocks and clean visual hierarchy.
previewTitle: Case studies that sell the work before the call.

name: Atlas Commerce
summary: A fashion-forward storefront with merchandising blocks, editorial landing pages, and a sharper mobile cart.
description: Every section was tuned to keep products visual-first while still surfacing trust, promotions, and bundle moments.
previewTitle: Merchandising, editorial storytelling, and a better cart flow.

name: Signal Cloud
summary: A crisp SaaS site built to explain a technical product without drowning the user in jargon.
description: The layout balances trust, product clarity, and momentum with modular sections that can scale across campaigns.
previewTitle: Clear product messaging with proof woven into every section.

name: Flowtime
summary: A calm mobile product centered on streaks, routines, and daily progress without feeling gamified.
description: The showcase preview emphasizes the daily loop: plan, complete, review, and return without overwhelming the screen.
previewTitle: A focused routine app with just enough momentum to keep people coming back.

name: Route Buddy
summary: A trip planner that turns itineraries, maps, and booking details into one calm mobile workspace.
description: Preview cards highlight mapping, saved stops, and trip blocks so visitors instantly understand the app at a glance.
previewTitle: Trip planning that feels ordered, visual, and easy to trust.

name: Pocket Pantry
summary: A recipe and grocery app that keeps meal planning visual, fast, and practical on the go.
description: The preview system shows list states, ingredient cards, and progress nudges instead of abstract device mockups.
previewTitle: From pantry scan to recipe picks in a single smooth flow.

name: Frameboard
summary: A Mac workspace for planning launches, tracking priorities, and keeping context visible without clutter.
description: Its preview leans into window chrome, layered panels, and dense-but-readable desktop patterns built for longer sessions.
previewTitle: A native desktop board that stays calm even when the roadmap does not.

name: Focus Dock
summary: A distraction-light Mac app that turns a menu bar utility into a richer planning and timer experience.
description: The showcase frames it as a desktop product first, with concise dashboards, quick controls, and subtle native polish.
previewTitle: Quick controls up top, deeper planning when you need a fuller view.

name: Clip Vault
summary: A native asset organizer for teams that need searchable previews, batch actions, and quick visual sorting.
description: The large preview highlights preview panes, metadata surfaces, and file-heavy patterns that feel right at home on macOS.
previewTitle: Big previews, fast search, and metadata that stays useful instead of noisy.
